hero.name: Julia Pilch
hero.title: Physiotherapist
hero.tagline: Physiotherapy grounded in movement, function, and an individual approach.

availability.text: Currently seeking a clinic position in Trondheim — and learning Norwegian (A1) for the long term.

about.heading: A flexible, individual approach to physiotherapy.
paragraphs: I specialise in movement-based rehabilitation, combining manual therapy, medical training, and functional exercise to help patients return to their goals. I work with orthopaedic patients, athletes recovering from injuries, and individuals after amputations, always focusing on understanding the person behind the condition and creating a personalised path toward better function, strength, and independence.

I am seeking a role where I can bring my experience in physiotherapy and medical training while continuing to grow in a dynamic environment focused on movement, rehabilitation, and improving patients' quality of life.
about.imageAlt: Julia Pilch working with a patient
